unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: A Day in Your Digital Life
drDigitalIntro:
You've learned everything you need. Now put it all together — on your real computer!

Here's your final checklist. Try to do each one:

1. Send an email to a friend or family member with a photo attached.
2. Create a Google Doc at docs.google.com — type a short note and share it with someone.
3. Go to maps.google.com and get walking directions to your nearest library.
4. Make a video call to a family member (use Zoom, FaceTime, WhatsApp, or whatever app they use).
5. Open your Calendar app and create an event for next week.

You don't have to do them all today — but try at least two or three. Every one of these is something you can now do confidently.
drDigitalSuccess: Congratulations — you've completed the course! You can now email, message, browse, manage files, take photos, install apps, and stay safe online. You're a confident computer user. Keep exploring and trying new things!
drDigitalHint: Pick any two items from the checklist and try them on your real computer. You've practiced all of these in the lessons.
